description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a skeletonized stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle has a prominent, boxy magazine located beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity or drum-style feeding system. The barrel is relatively short and robust, with no visible muzzle device attached at the end. The upper receiver and handguard are streamlined, lacking any visible rail attachments or mounted optics, indicating a minimalist design. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components in the grip and stock. The rifle's design is utilitarian, likely intended for close-quarters or urban environments.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and a boxy magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and large boxy magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the offset magazine protruding below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and grip, with clear visibility of the magazine and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the alignment of the stock and grip, with the magazine partially visible below.
